## Abstract

Our model achieves 92% accuracy on standard benchmarks.

## Introduction

Deep neural networks achieve 95% accuracy on image classification tasks.

Our method is 2x faster than baseline approaches in the literature.

## Methods

We use standard cross-entropy loss with Adam optimizer.

Figure 1 shows the pipeline architecture.

The method outperforms all prior approaches on three benchmark datasets.
